summary: Tested new Google Maps sections on Home and Contact pages. All features working correctly: Home page has 'Our Location' section with embedded Google Maps iframe (dark theme filter applied), 'Get Directions' link pointing to correct URL. Contact page has 'Find Us on Map' section with embedded map iframe, updated location text to 'OEC Tech Institute, Chunian, Pakistan', and 'Get Directions' link in contact info. Contact form still functional. All existing Home page sections render correctly.
passed_tests: Home map iframe has correct Google Maps URL: https://www.google.com/maps?q=OEC+Tech+Institute+Chunian&output=embed
Home map iframe has dark theme filter: invert(90%) hue-rotate(180deg) brightness(0.95) contrast(0.9)
Home 'Get Directions' link has correct URL: https://maps.app.goo.gl/ateRRsVJD3z4GRTX8
FAQ section still present after location section
Contact map iframe has correct Google Maps URL
Contact map iframe has dark theme filter applied
'Find Us on Map' heading present on Contact page
Location text updated to 'OEC Tech Institute, Chunian, Pakistan'
Contact directions link has correct URL
Contact form fields all present (name, email, subject, message, submit)
Contact form submission successful - success toast shown
All existing Home page sections render correctly (Hero, Featured Courses, Benefits, Diploma Tracks, Reviews, CTA, FAQ)
test_credentials: No auth needed - public pages only
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Maps sections added to Home page (before FAQ) and Contact page (after form). Both use dark theme CSS filter. Maps show OEC Tech Institute in Chunian, Pakistan. Get Directions links point to https://maps.app.goo.gl/ateRRsVJD3z4GRTX8. All data-testid attributes properly implemented.
